'''dakana''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mnemist|mnemist]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-k-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mnemist|mnemist]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dakana
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dækænæth|dækænæth]] || [[word:dækænæj|dækænæj]] || [[word:dækænæsh|dækænæsh]] || [[word:dækænæ|dækænæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dakakanath|dakakanath]] || [[word:dakakanaj|dakakanaj]] || [[word:dakakanash|dakakanash]] || [[word:dakakana|dakakana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dakanath|dakanath]] || [[word:dakanaj|dakanaj]] || [[word:dakanash|dakanash]] || [[word:dakana|dakana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dakafnath|dakafnath]] || [[word:dakafnaj|dakafnaj]] || [[word:dakafnash|dakafnash]] || [[word:dakafnaf|dakafnaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dakanatha|dakanatha]] || [[word:dakanaja|dakanaja]] || [[word:dakanasha|dakanasha]] || [[word:dakanaka|dakanaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dakanath|dakanath]] || [[word:dakanaj|dakanaj]] || [[word:dakanash|dakanash]] || [[word:dakana|dakana]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dakanathal|dakanathal]] || [[word:dakanajal|dakanajal]] || [[word:dakanashal|dakanashal]] || [[word:dakanakal|dakanakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dakanathatha|dakanathatha]] || [[word:dakanajaja|dakanajaja]] || [[word:dakanashasha|dakanashasha]] || [[word:dakanaka|dakanaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dakanathan|dakanathan]] || [[word:dakanajan|dakanajan]] || [[word:dakanashan|dakanashan]] || [[word:dakanakan|dakanakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dakanathaoro|dakanathaoro]] || [[word:dakanajaoro|dakanajaoro]] || [[word:dakanashaoro|dakanashaoro]] || [[word:dakanakaoro|dakanakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
